message:
test: add comprehensive tests for configurable baseUrl support

Verifies the baseUrl feature added in adbcce4 for OpenRouter and other
OpenAI-compatible providers:
- ConfigSchema accepts optional baseUrl field
- loadConfig reads baseUrl from global config file
- Env var fallbacks (OPENAI_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, GOOGLE_BASE_URL)
- Config baseUrl takes precedence over env vars
- CLI overrides take precedence over both
- Default behavior unchanged when neither is set
- getModel passes baseUrl to all provider constructors (openai, anthropic, google)
- Ollama provider correctly ignores generic baseUrl
- End-to-end OpenRouter and Azure OpenAI config validation

Closes #29

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
